title: Contract anchor baseline
summary: A capability evolves behind a stable contract, and the runtime resolves interactions through one explicit behavioral definition.

services.summary: Normalizes incoming customer profiles against a stable contract.
Indexes normalized profiles for search and retrieval.
Records governed profile updates for operational review.

runtime_decisions: Validated one contract lineage for customer.profile.normalize.
Allowed both consumers because they share the same normalized-profile semantics.
Recorded runtime compatibility evidence for the current contract version.
expectations: A stable contract can absorb internal change without forcing consumer rewrites.
Runtime governance keeps behavior aligned by checking interactions against the same explicit definition.
This is the Chapter 11 reference state: evolution is possible, but coherence is preserved.
